title: Register a site
description: Add one school, clinic or household to the programme's register.

steps.title: Identify the site
steps.description: A code, a name, and what kind of site it is.
steps.voiceScript: Give the site a code and a name, and say what kind of site it is.
steps.captionText: Give the site a code and a name, and say what kind of site it is.
steps.fallbackMessage: Identify the site: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Where it is
steps.voiceScript: Say where it is. The location is what the survey team will be sent to.
steps.captionText: Say where it is. The location is what the survey team will be sent to.
steps.fallbackMessage: Where it is: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Registered, not yet qualified
steps.description: Being on the register is not approval.
steps.voiceScript: Registering a site does not qualify it. It must still be scored, and somebody must still decide.
steps.captionText: Registering a site does not qualify it. It must still be scored, and somebody must still decide.
steps.fallbackMessage: Registered, not yet qualified: not visible on this screen yet.
